name: cpig-bool-refactor-08-moved-operand
description: BUG-0019 + BUG-0020 regression guard. Pattern: create sphere at one location, create box at another, _Move the box (registry World transform set), then _CPigUnion. Pre-fix, the moved operand's world translation was DROPPED at the boolean step (the composite landed at the AUTHORED positions). BUG-0019 added the translate-wrapper Relocate path; BUG-0020 made EstimateBBox propagate bounds through the forward transform. Phase 1's Kind::TRANSFORM structured composite carries the m_inv matrix in op_meta and evaluate() applies it. The TEST GATE: union completes and a real frame presents. Visual: sphere and box at their moved positions, unioned (no NaN, no tiny clipped sliver at origin).

checkpoints.name: moved-operand-union
checkpoints.description: Union of sphere at origin with box that was created at +30 then moved to 0 (overlapping the sphere). Must show the box overlapping the sphere at the MOVED position, not at the authored +30 position. BUG-0019/0020 regression guard.
